```{r}
library(spatstat.explore)
library(Seurat)
library(tricycle)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(ggplot2)
library(scattermore)
library(scater)
```

## Load in data
```{r}
load('data/mouse_msobj_transformed_analysis.rda')
mouse_data <- as.matrix(msobj@assays[["Spatial"]]@counts) # genes by spots [36601 74096]
```

## Run Tricycle
```{r}
## RUN TRICYCLE ON LOG RAW COUNTS
sce <- SingleCellExperiment(list(logcounts = log1p(mouse_data)))

# Schwabe cell cycle stage
sce_stage <- sce
cc_stage <- estimate_Schwabe_stage(sce_stage,
                                  gname.type = 'SYMBOL',
                                  species = 'mouse')

write.csv(cc_stage@colData, 'cellcycleStage.csv')

# Tricycle theta values
tricycle_sobj <- project_cycle_space(cc_stage, species="mouse", gname.type = c("SYMBOL"))
tricycle_sobj_cellPos <- estimate_cycle_position(tricycle_sobj)
saveRDS(tricycle_sobj_cellPos, 'tricycleResults.RDS')
```
